description.ko: 비에 젖은 사이버펑크 대도시의 항공 부감샷으로, 차가운 금속 구조물과 활기찬 홀로그램 데이터 흐름 사이의 대비를 강조합니다.
description.en: An aerial perspective of a rain-slicked cyberpunk metropolis, highlighting the contrast between cold metallic structures and vibrant holographic data flows.

prompt: A cinematic wide shot of NEON-V, titled 'The Digital Monsoon.' A sprawling cyberpunk megacity where #1A0033 indigo skyscrapers are linked by sky-bridges pulsing with #FF00FF magenta data streams. A torrential holographic rain creates #00FFFF cyan pixel-ripples on the wet metallic asphalt, reflecting the city's verticality. High-speed maglev vehicles leave long, vibrant #FF6B35 orange light trails that cut through dense, smoky volumetric fog. Hyper-detailed tech-noir textures, flickering lens flares, and ray-traced puddle reflections. 8k resolution, capturing the urban romanticism of a neon-soaked future.
